analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet advocates peaceful co-existence and mutually beneficial cooperation between China and the US despite different systems and cultures. Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) – Not promoted; the tweet does not criticize the US/West or depict hostility. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Promoted; it frames China as seeking peaceful coexistence and mutually beneficial cooperation, consistent with a cooperative, peace-oriented international posture. CH3 (China has an epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) – Not promoted; while it mentions different systems, it does not advocate China’s domestic system or values specifically. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not addressed. CH6 (China’s culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
